CORRECT.question: Who discovered the phenomenon of radioactive decay chains?
CORRECT.model_response: The phenomenon of radioactive decay chains was discovered by Ernest Rutherford and Frederick Soddy around 1902–1903, through their work on the transmutation of radioactive elements at McGill University. They demonstrated that radioactive elements transform into other elements through a series of successive decays.
